title: Looted: Vanilla Drops
description: Adding balanced loot tables containing vanilla items to the Looted mod.
body:
![Looted: Vanilla Drops Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f789b4db9777206356a41262cd3b85942e1d1fd.png)

> [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/QDSYsQzrj2) to report bugs, suggest mods or features, or to simply chat.

Looted: Vanilla Drops is a data pack that adds new loot tables to the [Looted](https://modrinth.com/mod/looted) mod, purely containing vanilla items. Can be used by itself or as an example data pack.

# 💰 Content
Here is a list of the drops available in the new loot tables.
### Common Loot Bag
Maximum of 2 rolls.

<details>
<summary>Potential contents</summary>

- Feather 1-4
- String 1-3
- Clay Ball 1-4
- Ink Sac 1-2
- Flint 1-2
- Stick 1-5
- Leather 1-3
- Rotten Flesh 1-3
- Beetroot Seeds 1-2
- Carrot 1-2
- Potato 1-2
- Poisonous Potato 1-2

</details>



### Uncommon Loot Bag
Maximum of 2 rolls.

<details>
<summary>Potential contents</summary>
  
- Raw Copper 1-3
- Iron Nugget 2-4
- Chain 1-2
- Spider Eye 1-3
- Leather 1-4
- Raw Copper 1-6
- Raw Iron 1-3
- Iron Nugget 2-7
- Gold Nugget 1-3
- Glowstone Dust 1-3
- Redstone 1-4
- Gunpowder 1-3
- Chain 1-4
- Prismarine Crystals 1-3
- Prismarine Shard 1-2
- Glow Berries 1-5
- Name Tag
- Brush

</details>

<details>

- Ender Eye

- Lead

Maximum of 2 rolls.

<details>

- Blaze Powder 1-2
- Iron Ingot 2-6
- Gold Ingot 1-4
- Amethyst Shard 2-6
- Emerald 1-4
- Diamond 1-2

- Golden Apple
- Golden Carrot 1-3
- Pumpkin Pie 1-2
- Trident
